# Lumenyl

> Lumenyl is a free AI search readiness platform that benchmarks whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot can discover, understand, trust, extract, and cite your website.

## Overview

- **What it does**: Evaluates 30+ checks across 6 weighted dimensions covering AI crawler access, server-rendered content, schema.org depth, answer-ready passages, citation authority, and emerging LLM standards.
- **Who it's for**: SEO teams, content strategists, developer advocates, and marketing teams who want to ensure their pages are citation-ready for frontier AI answer engines.
- **How to use**: Enter a public URL at [lumenyl.onrender.com](https://lumenyl.onrender.com/) or use the JSON API.
- **Cost**: Free and open source. No account or API key required.

## Dimensions evaluated

1. **AI crawler access & indexability** — Checks 5 AI retrieval crawlers (OAI-SearchBot, Claude-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot, bingbot), 5 training crawlers, and 3 on-demand fetchers. Separates citation access from training policy.
2. **Answer quality & citation potential** — Evaluates answer-first summaries, verifiable statistics, authoritative citations, extractable paragraphs, FAQ coverage, expert language, original data, and freshness dates.
3. **Structured data & entity intelligence** — Analyzes JSON-LD/schema.org coverage, entity machine-readability, title and meta description quality, heading hierarchy, and Open Graph metadata.
4. **Technical retrieval performance** — Validates HTML content type, server-rendered content, response speed, canonical URLs, language metadata, and viewport configuration.
5. **Brand authority & entity footprint** — Checks brand consistency, sameAs/entity links, authoritative outbound references, authorship signals, and community mentions.
6. **Emerging AI standards** — Checks llms.txt, XML sitemap hygiene, AI disclosure headers, and content-usage preference signals.

## API

```bash
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/audit \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"url":"https://example.com"}' | jq
```

## Links

- [Lumenyl homepage](https://lumenyl.onrender.com/)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/jonathanau/ai-search-optimizer)
- [ACM KDD 2024 GEO research](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3637528.3671900)
- [Gartner: Organic search traffic decline forecast](https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2024-10-21-gartner-forecasts-organic-search-traffic-will-decline-25-percent-by-2026-due-to-generative-ai-search-engines)
- [Schema.org](https://schema.org/)
- [IETF AIPREF](https://www.ietf.org/)

## Run locally

Requires Node.js 18+.

```bash
npm install
npm start
# Open http://localhost:3000
```

## Limitations

Lumenyl is a readiness benchmark, not a guarantee of inclusion in any AI answer engine. It inspects public page artifacts from a single URL at audit time. It does not execute full browser rendering, crawl an entire domain, or query external LLM/search APIs.
